reviews.comment:

Excellent place to take a short break while traveling! The service was great! I gladly stopped by to fill up and have a coffee! Very grateful for your attention!

reviews.comment:
Parada obligatoria camino a Federación. Los baños siempre limpios, los playeros siempre sumamente cordiales.
Si sos socio del ACA, aplica el descuento correspondiente tanto en nafta como en el full.
Tiene un área de descanso para poder dejar el auto bajo sombra.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way to Federación. The restrooms are always clean, and the attendants are always incredibly friendly.
If you're an ACA member, you'll receive the corresponding discount on both gasoline and the full option. There's a rest area where you can park your car in the shade.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias, trabajamos constantemente para brindarles el mejor servicio!

reviews.comment:
Hubo poca gente a pesar de ser sabado a la mañana. Con protocolo. Los baños limpios. La gente atenta. Como siempre. Detrás de la estación tiene un amplio espacio verde como  parar descansar y un refrigerio

(Translated by Google)
There were few people despite it being a Saturday morning. They followed all the safety protocols. The restrooms were clean. The staff was attentive, as always. Behind the station, there's a large green space perfect for relaxing and having a snack.
